---
title: "Personal"
---

 
I’m originally from Nara, Japan. I enjoy watching sports, especially baseball and basketball, and have visited several MLB ballparks in the U.S.

::: {.column-page}
::: {.gallery-grid}

::: {.gallery-item}
![Orix Buffaloes](pictures/hobby.jpeg){.gallery-img}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
![My Hometown: Yamato-Koriyama, Japan](pictures/hometown.jpeg){.gallery-img}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
![Detroit Pistons](pictures/pistons.jpeg){.gallery-img}
:::

::: {.gallery-item}
![Comerica Park](pictures/detroit_tigers.jpeg){.gallery-img}
:::

:::
:::
